name: recomby-geo
description: GEO reference implementation from the recomby-geo hub (agents.md / clis.md / skills collection for domain AI employees). 7 slash commands (/01-intake → /07-reaudit) drive a collaborative workflow; 6 vendored open-source skills (audit, content writing, schema, internal linking, keyword expansion, quality scoring) supply the commodity capabilities. Per-client folder convention.
